title: JEE Advanced 2026 Cut-Off: Check Category-Wise Number Of Qualified Candidates
description: Category-Wise Cut-Off For JEE Advanced 2026: JEE Main 2026 was held in two sessions, January and April. The Session 2 examination for Paper 1 was conducted on April 2, 4, 5, 6, and 8 across nine shifts in computer-based mode.
